This is a testharness.js-based test.

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_label is not a function"

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_label is not a function"
[FAIL] button with leading form feed control character in aria-label is valid
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_label is not a function"
[FAIL] nav with trailing nbsp char aria-label is valid (nbsp is preserved in name)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_label is not a function"
[FAIL] button with leading nbsp char in aria-label is valid (and uses aria-label)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_label is not a function"
[FAIL] button with empty aria-label does not use aria-label as name
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_label is not a function"
[FAIL] textarea with tab character as aria-label does not use aria-label as name
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_label is not a function"
[FAIL] button with carriage return as aria-label does not use aria-label as name
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_label is not a function"
[FAIL] button with space characters as aria-label does not use aria-label as name
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_label is not a function"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
